title: Trackwok port
description: A vehicle‑building addon for Create and Valkyrien Skies 2 featuring wheels, tracks, and modular components for constructing cars, tanks, and custom mobile machines.
body:
English

🛠️ Trackwork – Port for Minecraft 1.19.2

This is an unofficial port of the [Trackwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/trackwork) mod, originally created by Endalion and licensed under the MIT License.

Trackwork is an addon for the [Valkyrien Skies 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mods, adding wheels and tank treads (tracks) to Minecraft, allowing you to build custom vehicles such as tanks, cars, and other land-based machines. With this mod, you can traverse rough terrain, race with friends, or even host vehicle battles — all with realistic physics and modular integration.

This port adapts the mod to Minecraft 1.19.2, preserving the core features and Forge compatibility.


⚠️ This port is provided without warranty and is not officially supported by the original author. Make sure to check the in‑game Ponders to learn how to use the mod properly.

📦 Requirements

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

[Valkyrien Skies 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies)

📜 License

This project is licensed under the MIT License.
All credit goes to the original author, Endalion.
See the included LICENSE file for more details.

Português

🛠️ Trackwork – Port para Minecraft 1.19.2

Este é um port não oficial do mod [Trackwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/trackwork), originalmente criado por Endalion e licenciado sob a MIT License.

O Trackwork é um addon para os mods [Valkyrien Skies 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) e [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), que adiciona rodas e lagartas (tracks) ao Minecraft, permitindo criar veículos personalizados como tanques, carros e outros meios de transporte terrestres. Com este mod, podes explorar terrenos difíceis, competir com amigos ou até organizar batalhas de veículos — tudo com física realista e integração modular.

Este port adapta o mod para a versão 1.19.2 do Minecraft, mantendo as funcionalidades principais e compatibilidade com Forge.



⚠️ Este port é fornecido sem garantias e não é oficialmente suportado pelo autor original. Consulta os Ponders no jogo para aprender a usar o mod corretamente.

![Build by fiz2zy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65859858245307be022486ece2b81a375db8e507.png)

📦 Requisitos

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

[Valkyrien Skies 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies)

📜 Licença

Este projeto está licenciado sob a MIT License. Todos os créditos vão para o autor original, Endalion. Consulta o ficheiro LICENSE incluído neste projeto para mais detalhes.
